booking.title: Reserve Your Stay
booking.intro: Select an option to request a booking at Grey House. We will review your request and contact you directly to arrange payment and details.
booking.ratesHintBefore: Nightly rates appear after check-in and check-out. Weekday vs weekend nights are priced separately (weekend = Fri–Sun nights). Minimum nights apply per season — the calendar will remind you if your stay is too short. Dates in
booking.ratesHintAfter: are free nights that still cannot start a stay (not enough consecutive nights before the next booking).
booking.pkgC_desc: The Ultimate Sanctuary (All 4 Beds & Both Pools)
booking.successBody: Thank you for your interest in Grey House. We have received your booking request for {{range}}. Our concierge team will be in touch shortly.
booking.guestsFixed: Capacity is fixed for each experience.
booking.notCharged: You won't be charged yet. This is a booking request.
booking.calendarPrompt: Select your check-in and check-out dates
booking.selectExperienceCalendar: Select an experience on the left to enable dates
booking.minHint_mid: (may apply across season changes). Periods near your dates:
booking.minHint_suffix: . Choose check-out at least {{n}} {{nights}} after check-in.
booking.minHint_simple: Choose check-out at least {{n}} {{nights}} after check-in (rules tighten near season boundaries).
booking.policyText: A 50% deposit is required to secure your reservation. The remaining balance is due 30 days prior to arrival.
booking.secureText: All payments are processed securely via wire transfer or encrypted credit card link upon booking confirmation.
booking.minStayModalP2a: The minimum stay for nights you selected is {{required}} {{reqNightWord}}
booking.minStayModalP2strict: — rules use the strictest minimum when seasons differ
booking.minStayModalP2end: . Please choose a later check-out. Your check-in is kept — pick a new check-out on the calendar.
booking.error_datesUnavailable: Some of these dates are no longer available. Please choose different dates.
booking.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
booking.error_gapCheckIn: That night isn’t available as a check-in — there aren’t enough consecutive nights before the next booking for the minimum stay. You can still use it as a check-out if your stay ends the night before.
booking.error_rangeBooked: That range includes booked dates. Choose a check-out that avoids booked nights, or tap another check-in date.
booking.error_bookedNights: Those dates include booked nights. Please pick a new check-in.

villa.inquireIntro: Grey House Villas are offered as a complete estate or individual residences. Each villa is delivered turnkey with full designer furnishings.
villa.galleryHelp: Click a panel to bring it forward. Double-click the enlarged center image for full screen.
villa.allSeasonsEmpty: No note has been set for this villa yet.
villa.bookingInsteadHint: For availability and messages, please use the booking flow on this site.

testimonials.label: Client Experiences
testimonials.heading: Words of
testimonials.sub: Hear from the investors, architects, and residents who have experienced the unparalleled luxury and craftsmanship of Grey House Villas.

items.name: Eleanor Vance
items.text: The attention to detail at Grey House Villas is unparalleled. The seamless integration of Katouna stone with modern Italian finishings creates an atmosphere that is both grounded and incredibly luxurious. A truly exceptional addition to our portfolio.

items.name: Marcus Thorne
items.text: What Katouna has achieved here is a masterclass in contextual architecture. The way the structures step down the mountain, offering complete privacy while maximizing those endless Ionian views, is nothing short of brilliant.

items.name: Sophia & Julian Wright
items.text: From the moment we stepped onto the terrace of Villa Oneiro, we knew we had found our sanctuary. The underfloor heating makes it perfect for winter retreats, while the summer breeze off the sea is simply magical.

items.name: Isabella Rossi
items.text: The turnkey delivery exceeded all expectations. The curation of European designer furniture perfectly complements the raw, organic nature of the estate. It's rare to find a property that requires absolutely zero compromise.

schedule.title: Book a 30 Min Meeting With The Grey Villa Sales Team
schedule.videoNote: Web conferencing details provided upon confirmation.
